Reviewed `src/nfa/contiguous.rs`, which implements the contiguous Aho-Corasick NFA state encoding, builder, and search transitions. I checked for install-time hooks, network or exfiltration behavior, credential/secret access, dynamic code loading, obfuscation/packing, and persistence tampering; none were present in this target file.
